speaker: Marco
text: I lost my job. I didn’t even know how to tell you.

speaker: Alice
text: Marco... I’m so sorry. You shouldn’t have kept it to yourself.

speaker: Marco
text: I was ashamed... I don’t want you to think I’m a failure.

speaker: Alice
text: I’ll never think that. What matters is that you’re here, with me.

speaker: Marco
text: I don’t know if I can start over...

speaker: Alice
text: We’ll do it together. I promise I won’t leave you alone.

speaker: Marco
text: But you deserve better, I don’t want to drag you down.

speaker: Alice
text: I want you, not what you do or don’t do. Just you.

speaker: Alice
text: It scares me too. But we’ll face it step by step.

speaker: Marco
text: Thank you... I don’t know what I’d do without you.

speaker: Alice
text: You’ll never have to know, because I won’t let you face it alone.
